steps.title: Connect the claim to context
steps.content: Ellison is cautioning investors and enthusiasts who think books will be displaced by newer media. The underlined sentence pushes back by saying interactive text is much older than technologists assume.

steps.title: Reject misread functions
steps.content: B says the sentence supports technologists, but it challenges them. C invents a comparison between academics and investors. D treats marginal notes as a technological challenge, which is not the point of the sentence.

steps.title: Name the function
steps.content: The underlined portion challenges the stance of the investors and enthusiasts mentioned earlier. The answer is A.
